content.method: Use the study or pilot design stated in the migrated v1 research agenda.
content.question: The 2027 budget bill text showing either a cardinal-law funding-floor commitment or temporary, deficit-contingent compensation language, plus EC fiscal guidance on permissible spending commitments, to establish whether statutory funding floors are politically achievable (S4).
content.why_it_matters: It can change the comparison of transformation choices.
